Paths/Frontend Development/JavaScript Essentials

JavaScript Essentials

Add interactivity and logic to your web pages with JavaScript.

JavaScript is the programming language of the web, enabling dynamic and interactive content.

Key Concepts

  • Variables: `let`, `const`, and `var` for storing data.
  • Functions: Reusable blocks of code — regular functions and arrow functions.
  • DOM Manipulation: Select and modify HTML elements with `document.querySelector()`.
  • Events: Respond to user actions like clicks, keypresses, and form submissions.
  • ES6+ Features: Template literals, destructuring, spread operator, modules.

Example

// DOM manipulation
const button = document.querySelector('#myButton');

button.addEventListener('click', () => {
  const output = document.querySelector('#output');
  output.textContent = 'Button clicked!';
  output.style.color = '#3b82f6';
});

Resources
